title: Agent
description: A stateful tool-using Solver. Agents carry tools, a step budget, and a per-call budget node, and are inherently re-runnable rather than cache-hit. Same identity surface as Solver, plus the agentic extras.

version.description: SemVer for the agent's logic + tool set + prompt scaffolding.

kind.description: Agent flavor. `react` = ReAct-style think/act loop; `plan-execute` = explicit planner + executor; `custom` = user-defined.

model_ref.description: The primary model the agent reasons with.

prompt_template_ref.description: Optional reference into the PromptStore for the agent's scaffold prompt.

tools.description: Tool references this agent is allowed to call. Each entry is a name + version + optional inline tool spec; the Sandbox/MCP layer resolves these to concrete callables.

mcp_url.description: Optional MCP server URL providing this tool.

max_steps.description: Hard ceiling on agent loop iterations per Sample. Exceeding this is an error, NOT a budget event.

budget_ref.description: Reference to a Budget node (by Ulid or `$id` URL) governing this agent's resource consumption. Each agent invocation walks the budget tree (research/12 §2.4).

params.description: Open agent-specific parameters (temperature, reflection cadence, etc.).
